title: Winter situation reports, week ending 6 December 2015
body: "A daily return will be collected from acute trusts and will provide information about capacity including bed occupancy and availability, demand including A&E attendances and emergency admissions and any A&E closures or diverts in response. The data will be published each week. The first publication will be on Friday 11th December.  Official statistics are produced impartially and free from any political influence. "
